======
Simple
======

def sampleFunction1 x := x*x + 3

def result1 := sampleFunction1 4573

theorem foo : p := sorry

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (binders
      (identifier))
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (number)))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (application
      (identifier)
      (number)))
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (identifier)
    (sorry)))

=========
Annotated
=========

def sampleFunction2 (x : Nat) := 2*x*x - x + 3

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (number)
            right: (identifier))
          right: (identifier))
        right: (identifier))
      right: (number))))

==================
Multiple Annotated
==================

def sampleFunction2 (x y : Nat) := x + y

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (identifier)
      right: (identifier))))

==================
Implicit Arguments
==================

def foo {a} {b c : Nat} v w (x y) (z : Nat) := a + b + v + w + x + y

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier))
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier))
      (identifier)
      (identifier)
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier))
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (binary_expression
              left: (identifier)
              right: (identifier))
            right: (identifier))
          right: (identifier))
        right: (identifier))
      right: (identifier))))

============================
Typeclass Resolved Arguments
============================

def foo [Bar x] [y : Baz] : x := 1

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (instance_binder
        type: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier)))
      (instance_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    type: (identifier)
    body: (number)))

====================
First Class Function
====================

def twice (f : Nat → Nat) (a : Nat) :=
  f (f a)

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (arrow
          domain: (identifier)
          codomain: (identifier)))
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (application
      name: (identifier)
      arguments: (parenthesized
        (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (identifier))))))

====================
Function Return Type
====================

def foo : Nat -> Nat := id

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (identifier))
    body: (identifier)))

==================================
Multiargument Function Return Type
==================================

def foo : Nat -> Nat -> Nat -> Nat := id

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (arrow
          domain: (identifier)
          codomain: (identifier))))
    body: (identifier)))

=============
Def of Struct
=============

def f : Foo where
  bar := 3

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)
    body: (where_decl
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number))))

==================
Match Syntax Sugar
==================

def foo : Nat → Nat
  | 0 => 2
  | 2 => 3
  | _ => 5

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (identifier))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (number)
      body: (number))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (number)
      body: (number))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (hole)
      body: (number))))

==========================================
Match Syntax Sugar With Anonymous Function
==========================================

def foo : Nat -> Bool :=
  fun
    | 0 => true
    | _ => false

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      (identifier)
      (identifier))
    body: (fun
      lhs: (number)
      (true)
      lhs: (hole)
      (false))))

=======================
Multimatch Syntax Sugar
=======================

def foo : Nat → Nat -> Nat
  | 0, foo => 2
  | 2, bar => 3
  | _, _ => 5

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (arrow
      domain: (identifier)
      codomain: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (identifier)))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (number)
      patterns: (identifier)
      body: (number))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (number)
      patterns: (identifier)
      body: (number))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (hole)
      patterns: (hole)
      body: (number))))

============
Conditionals
============

def sampleFunction3 (x : Int) :=
if x > 100 then
  2*x*x - x + 3
else
  2*x*x + x - 37

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    body: (if
      condition: (binary_expression
        left: (identifier)
        right: (number))
      then: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (binary_expression
              left: (number)
              right: (identifier))
            right: (identifier))
          right: (identifier))
        right: (number))
      else: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (binary_expression
              left: (number)
              right: (identifier))
            right: (identifier))
          right: (identifier))
        right: (number)))))

=======
Theorem
=======

theorem twiceAdd2 (a : Nat) : twice (fun x => x + 2) a = a + 4 :=
-- The proof is by reflexivity. Lean "symbolically" reduces both sides of the equality
-- until they are identical.
  rfl

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (application
        name: (application
          name: (identifier)
          arguments: (parenthesized
            (fun
              binders: (identifier)
              body: (binary_expression
                left: (identifier)
                right: (number)))))
        arguments: (identifier))
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (identifier)
        right: (number)))
    (comment)
    (comment)
    body: (identifier)))

============================
Theorem With Expression Body
============================

theorem bar : 2 * 3 = 3 * 2 := Nat.mul_comm 2 3

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number)))
    body: (application
      name: (application
        name: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier))
        arguments: (number))
      arguments: (number))))

=======================
Theorem With Match Body
=======================

theorem foo {p : α × β} :
  p = p ↔ p = p
  | (p1, p2), (q1, q2) => sorry

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (binary_expression
          left: (identifier)
          right: (identifier))))
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (identifier)
          right: (identifier))
        right: (identifier))
      right: (identifier))
    (match_arm
      patterns: (tuple
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      patterns: (tuple
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      body: (sorry))))

====================
Theorem Missing Type
====================

theorem foo := sorry

---

(module
  (definition
    (identifier)
    (sorry)))
